description:
# ZEE5 Android TV Privacy Patches 1.0.0

Privacy patches for ZEE5 Android TV (com.graymatrix.did, v5.78.8):
- Disable ads (Google IMA server-side ad insertion)
- Disable analytics (central trackEvent dispatch)
- Disable CleverTap (SDK init + GAID collection)
- Disable Firebase analytics (event reporting)

Pure bytecode edits; no paid/subscription functionality touched.
